message:
🌱 Add antrea: Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies mission (#1810)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "antrea-3263-accept-protocol-icmp-on-clusternetworkpolicies",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "antrea: Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies",
+    "description": "Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current antrea deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your antrea version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nhelm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working antrea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review antrea configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nkubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea\n```\n**Describe the problem/challenge you have**\nI would like to allow ping as a ClusterNetworkPolicy.\nUnfortunatelly ICMP is not supported yet.\n\nAccept protocol: ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicy and maybe _icmpType_ to describe the ICMP code allowed."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies",
+        "description": "Had another round of discussion in the community meeting. We decided not to remove `ports` field. Users are familiar with `ports` field, and the usage of ICMP is much smaller than other protocols. If users want to use ICMP or they prefer the new struct, they could choose to use `Protocols` as an advanced feature. Otherwise, they could keep using `ports`. Also, in this way, we don’t need to bump up the API version. \n\n``` golang\ntype Rule struct {\n   Action    *RuleAction\n   Ports\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade antrea to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade antrea:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade antrea antrea/antrea --namespace antrea\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea\nhelm list -n antrea\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea\nkubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Accept protocol = ICMP on ClusterNetworkPolicies\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Had another round of discussion in the community meeting. We decided not to remove `ports` field. Users are familiar with `ports` field, and the usage of ICMP is much smaller than other protocols. If users want to use ICMP or they prefer the new struct, they could choose to use `Protocols` as an advanced feature. Otherwise, they could keep using `ports`.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
